text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But... if I buy this... it'll be even longer before I
can afford that concert DVD!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm just gonna have to tough it out!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll figure something out for my skin problem. This
is for the DVD... For the DVD!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital leaves the school store looking
pained. It seems she's forcing herself to put up
with a skin condition.
